title: How to build an AI Agent and MCP Server (step-by-step)
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build AI agents using Model Context Protocol (MCP), an open standard that connects agents to live data and tools like Google Trends. The video covers MCP architecture, integration patterns, and showcases implementation using Google's Agent Development Kit.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through building an AI agent and an MCP server step-by-step. Model Context Protocol is an open standard that connects AI agents to external tools and live data sources, and the demonstration uses Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) to wire an agent to external data. The concrete example integrates Google Trends as a live data source through an MCP server, covering tool integration and agent orchestration.
